leadText: Cream Cheese (Japanese: クリームチーズ Cream Cheese) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A condiment offering very sweet and very tart flavor. It goes well with more ingredients than you'd expect, making it a convenient go-to.
